steps.title: Simplify q(x) by combining like terms
steps.content:
The function is $q(x) = a|x - 9| + 2 - 87|x - 9| + b$. Combining the absolute value terms:
$$q(x) = (a - 87)|x - 9| + (b + 2)$$

steps.title: Substitute the value of h
steps.content:
We have $h = (a - 87) \cdot 630 + (b + 2)$. Therefore: $$-164h = -164\left[(a - 87) \cdot 630 + (b + 2)\right]$$ $$= -164 \cdot 630 \cdot (a - 87) - 164(b + 2)$$ $$= -103320(a - 87) - 164b - 328$$
The answer simplifies to $\boxed{630}$.
